en: How do you go to the block-house?
I drive to the block-house.
How does he go to the hospital?
He walks to the hospital.
How do you go to Penghu?

ab: ango kaiyako ki hikoki mo penghw.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.
How do you go to Penghu?

ab: ango kaiyako ki sodang mo penghw.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.
How do you go home?
I go home by MRT.

ab: ango manema mwa tatakesikesiya ko Sele’e?
en: How does panay go to school?

ab: angokai ki kisiya mo tatakesikesiya ko Sele’e.
en: panay goes to school by train.
How does kacaw go to church?
kacaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: angokai so ki ci’yng mwa twakesi?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ini, angokai yako ki baase mwa twakesi.
en: No, I go to school by bus.
Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: eene, angokai yako ki ’aliliding mwa twakesi.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: angokai so ki kawti mo Takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: eene, angokai yako kawti mo Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: lo mo Balrangaw so angokisiya so? angohikoki so?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: angokai yako hikoki, marearedare ki angokisiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: lo mo kiyokai so ai angobaase so? ai angosidosiya so?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: ’ongting sidodiyako mwkiyokai, lo ’ongting sidosiya kasolivate ki angobaase.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.
Is the market close to your house?

ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.
Is the post office close to the school?
Yes, it is within walking distance.
Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: lo molatadreta tisiyaba la dadavaceta lima bonkange wakelangata.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
